ValidationRule.description: To validate the Edit access for external users
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( CONTAINS($Profile.Name,"Community User"), (NOT(ISNEW())), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c,"For Owner Review")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c,"Wait / Hold")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c,"No PoC Required")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c,"PoC Details Provided")), ($Setup.Application_Config_Settings__c.Run_Insolvency_Status_Validations__c == True) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You don't have access to edit this record. Please contact System Administrator
